body: Amara, hope you're having a good end to the quarter! I wanted to reach out because I've been keeping a close eye on [Halfway Capital](vc/halfway-capital)'s recent moves in climate infrastructure and I think there's a founder I'd love to connect you with — she's building grid-edge storage software and is just starting to think about her Series A. I've known her for about two years and she's the real deal: strong technical background, early commercial traction, and a very clear-eyed view of where the utility market is heading. Would you have 30 minutes in the next couple of weeks for an intro call? Happy to send over a brief memo first if that's helpful before I make the introduction.
